{{Quote|For a devious and treacherous little bean counter, Ankkit, you show a surprising lack of tactical creativity.|Ghez Hokan|<ref name="Hard Contact" />}}
'''Lik Ankkit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]]. He lived in a [[Lik Ankkit's villa|villa]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], where he controlled the production of [[barq]] and other luxury foods, exploiting the poor farmers who couldn't afford the food that grew on their fields.

During the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Ankkit hired the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Ghez Hokan]] to enforce his dominance of the farmers. Hokan despised Ankkit, and thought of him as a "weak and decadent grocer".

When the Mandalorian was put in command of a small force of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] to defend a vital [[Qiilura nanovirus research facility|facility]], he used Ankkit's villa to hold some of his [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. The smashing of artifacts and scratching of floors by the droids was a great frustration to Ankkit.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ankkit appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="Hard Contact" /> Traviss stated after the novel's release that she deliberately didn't say whether Lik Ankkit was killed in the novel or not, and that in her notes she had him as fleeing to lick his financial wounds.<ref name="KT">{{JCFCite|url=posts/17503383|board=Literature|thread=The Official Republic Commando: Hard Contact Discussion Thread (Spoilers Allowed)|user=KarenTraviss|date=2004-11-15|time=5:07 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801144034/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-republic-commando-hard-contact-discussion-thread-spoilers-allowed.17248265/page-11}}</ref>
